title: v0.20.3-rc0: model/parsers: add gemma4 tool call repair (#15374)
description: The existing strict gemma4 tool parser is still the primary path, but if this fails, we try to repair by fixing some of the most commonly seen mistakes these models seem to make in practice. We repair by building up a set of candidates, and use the first candidate that parses. Repairs cover: missing Gemma string delimiters single-quoted string values, including a dangling Gemma delimiter raw terminal string values (if the corresponding tool schema indicates it should be a string) missing object
